name: standards closed-loop validation records the run result to a structured json file for tracking
command: mkdir -p standards && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/closed-loop-validate.sh" --synthetic-source test-std --out standards/closed-loop-result.json --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && [ -f standards/closed-loop-result.json ] && grep -q '"run_at":"2026-05-13T00:00:00Z"' standards/closed-loop-result.json && echo ok 1>&2
